sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Parting Shot
feat.text: You jump back and make a quick shot that catches your opponent by surprise. You Step and then make a ranged Strike with the required weapon. Your target is off-guard against the attack.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

archetype.name: Archer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Parting Shot at a different level than displayed here.

feat.requirement: You are wielding a loaded ranged weapon or a ranged weapon with reload 0
